name: Vegetable Latkes
recipeInstructions:
1. Pare and coarsely shred the potatoes and carrots. Shred the zucchini. Place in a bowl with the chopped onion.
2. Combine the eggs, egg whites, salt, and pepper; stir into the vegetable mixture. Sprinkle flour over the top; stir to mix.
3. Heat a non-stick griddle or heavy skillet to medium-high. Brush with oil. Drop batter by heaping tablespoonfuls onto the griddle. Flatten slightly. Cook until browned. Turn and brown the other side, adding a little oil as necessary.
4. Drain on paper towels and keep warm until ready to serve. Serve with applesauce, cranberry sauce, or a combination for dipping.
